programme.title: Hot Fuzz (2007)
programme.desc: An overly zealous, by-the-book London policeman is reassigned to a sleepy country village where the crime rate is virtually zero, and teamed up with an eager but dimwitted partner. But just as the officer's uneventful new environment begins to chafe, a grisly series of so-called accidents gives him reason to suspect a strange conspiracy is afoot. Action comedy, with Simon Pegg, Nick Frost, Jim Broadbent, Timothy Dalton and Paddy Considine

programme.title: Lethal Weapon

As bad weather and dubious construction methods hamper the team's progress, Zac's leadership is called into question. With the team way behind schedule, two new arrivals make a surprise entry into the camp

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastian's, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. Gordon is horrified to discover pre-processed and frozen ingredients on the menu, but there seems to be little he can do to help when he is thrown out of the kitchen

programme.title: Adult Material

Meanwhile, as Jolene strives to hold together the remnants of her broken home, a trip to the doctor reveals the hidden reality of her lifestyle

programme.title: Five Guys a Week
programme.desc: Based in Caerphilly, south Wales, 51-year-old Sharon lost her virginity in her teens and got pregnant on that very same night. A grandmother by the age of 40, she's always devoted her time and energy to her family. However, now they've all flown the nest, she wants to put herself first for a change. Prompted by this desire, she invites a globe-trotting sales executive, a cycling enthusiast, a removals company boss, a fitness enthusiast and a forklift driver to move in with her, hoping that one of them can prove a partner for life

However, this act sets in motion a series of events that threaten to destroy his entire life over the course of a single car journey. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Brad Garrett and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is angry to discover Ray recorded a Super Bowl game over their wedding video, and forces him to renew his marriage vows as a way of making amends. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: KACL staff compete against a rival station in a weight-loss challenge. Frasier refuses to participate, but Roz offers herself as part of the prize. Meanwhile, Niles struggles to cope with the sleepless nights caused by an unusual symptom of Daphne's pregnancy

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Maris is released on bail and placed under house arrest, only to embroil an unwitting Niles in a madcap scheme to flee the country. Meanwhile, Frasier is forced to take care of Roz's insurance agent Ann. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Julia Sweeney

programme.desc: Gina Butler, the founder of one of America's most successful bakeries, dons a disguise to go incognito among her employees, posing as a contestant on a reality show. programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary

Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: George meets Matt and Kevin, whose 1930s home stands out for all the wrong reasons. Sitting alongside the elegant Victorian and Edwardian properties in south-west London, this three-up, three-down is ugly from the outside and even worse on the inside, with dark, dated and badly designed spaces. Architects Katerina Dionysopoulou and Billy Mavropoulos are brought in to make most radical transformation on the programme to date - but will their wildly ambitious poured-concrete extension prove too innovative for the owners?

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne sets more tricky, puzzling and downright idiotic challenges for the celebrities, before Greg Davies decides who deserves the most points. Highlights include Johnny Vegas yelling from a tall chair, Katherine Parkinson forgetting how balloons work and Richard Herring flailing about in a dinghy. It remains to be seen what Daisy May Cooper and Mawaan Rizan will be doing - but it's unlikely to be dignified

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the rising incidence of theft in Northamptonshire, where in 2018 burglaries hit a five-year high. PC Imogen Robinson chases a prolific shoplifter who has stolen a box of chocolate bars from a shop. PC Ben Norris is dispatched to apprehend a suspected burglar who then carries out a rooftop protest

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of Finn McCool's, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, New York. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rugby enthusiast Andy and dental nurse Holly kick off the competition in Yorkshire with a Mexican fiesta - a fun-filled evening, but with a few blunders in the kitchen. Finally, it's the turn of Yorkshire couple Paul and Mandy to host with some 'proper grub'. After two nights of Paul larking around he has a few surprises in and out of the kitchen to try to secure the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Trump's Coronavirus Catastrophe
programme.desc: Matt Frei investigates the president's policies, actions and decisions during the pandemic, which has cost more than 200,000 American lives. There are revelations gathered from months of conversations with White House advisers and insiders, whistle-blowers, politicians who have worked with Trump and leading US scientists, as well as loyal Trump supporters

programme.desc: Morland Sanders investigates the American food that could be coming to Britain soon as part of a post-Brexit trade deal. with exclusive lab results revealing levels of dangerous bacteria on US supermarket meat. He looks at the widespread use of pesticides and hormones currently banned in the UK, and uncovers animal welfare concerns and declining hygiene standards in American food production, as well as fears the deal could harm the British farming industry

programme.title: Elizabeth and Margaret: Love & Loyalty
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the relationship between the Queen and her younger sister, revealing how Princess Margaret sacrificed her own happiness for her sibling and the monarchy. The programme explores how Margaret shaped the Queen in unexpected ways, from the early years when they were the perfect royal pair, to the 1960s when it was Margaret who stole the show, through the scandals and backlash of the 1970s

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Between 1975 and 1980, serial killer Peter Sutcliffe - known in the press as the Yorkshire Ripper - murdered 13 women and attacked at least seven more in the north of England. In this programme, psychologists and criminology experts analyse the personality of Sutcliffe and look at events in his childhood and adult life that may have triggered his descent into murder, and also examine how he managed to avoid suspicion despite being interviewed by police numerous times

programme.title: Walking Britain's Roman Roads
programme.desc: Dan Jones travels along Stane Street, which runs 67 miles from London to Chichester, and discovers what led the Romans to abandon Britain in the Fifth Century

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
programme.desc: As the country goes into lockdown in the midst of the coronavirus pandemic in March 2020, the Tower is forced to close its gates for the first time since the Second World War. As the weeks turn into months, cameras follow the small team of Yeoman Warders locked within the tower, keeping this great fortress running in isolation

programme.title: Henry VIII: Rise of a Tyrant
programme.desc: Three-part drama-documentary series revealing the truth about England's most infamous King, King Henry VIII. The second episode takes viewers on a journey through the turbulent marriages, affairs and tyrannical politics of King Henry VIII's reign, and explores how Henry's obsession with marrying Anne Boleyn resulted in a cataclysmic and hugely unpopular split with the Roman Catholic Church. The programme also examines Henry's relationship with his new chief advisor and enforcer, Thomas Cromwell, who would come to bear the brunt of the King's increasing unhinged behaviour in the years to come. Narrated by Jason Isaacs

programme.title: Queen: The Band That Rocked the World
programme.desc: The classic rock band's career highlights, from Freddie Bulsara's early days in Zanzibar, to his life-changing days as Freddie Mercury with the band Smile and eventually Queen. Aside from featuring clips from their first TV appearances, Live Aid, and the recent Oscar-winning biopic, there are also contributions from biographers, superfans, actors, celebrities, music experts and journalists

programme.title: Conspiracy
programme.desc: Part-dramatised documentary, exploring the more outrageous stories that have emerged from the era of classic rock, punk and disco. Claims made include that Mick Jagger and Keith Richards' busting for drugs was an FBI hit designed to prevent them corrupting the US nation's youth, that the Sex Pistols' hit God Save the Queen was held off the number one spot by a rigged chart, and that Jim Morrison's body was moved from the true place of his death

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate when naval cryptanalyst Andrew Wells is shot dead in a park outside Baltimore. At the scene, Tony spots a man who was one of his informants from 15 years earlier when he was a police officer, but who went into hiding after a bid to bring down the Russian mobsters he worked for went wrong. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team works with Abigail Borin of the Coast Guard Investigative Service after a highly suspicious explosion and fire on board an oil rig kills a US marine corps reservist. Abby detects malware in the platform's computer systems, while Ducky finds traces on the victim's body that lead to a lawyer who works for the oil company. Back in the office, a prankster is bringing some light relief and although the likeliest suspect is Tony, he denies any involvement. Crime drama, guest starring Diane Neal

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain with Chris Tarrant
programme.desc: The broadcaster examines how trains transformed the nation and shaped modern Britain. He begins in the cab of Puffing Billy, the world's oldest-surviving steam locomotive, which was built in 1813 and designed to move coal along a five-mile stretch of track from a Northumberland mine to the docks. Chris also tells the story of Henry Booth, who not only championed George Stephenson's famous Rocket, but also helped finance it, and talks about the work of the navvies who dug the tunnels and laid the tracks

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle brings lots of musical instruments into playgroup for the children to try out

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Dr Brown Bear teaches the playgroup what to do when there has been an accident, and they soon have a patient to try out the new skills they have learned

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Pedro Pony tries to rescue Tiddles the Tortoise from up a tree, setting off a chain of events that needs several visits from the doctors to save the day

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: Dada Go loses his car keys after a fun but slightly chilly day out at the beach. Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Revs unexpectedly slows down during a race, and when Noddy tries to find out why, he discovers that Revs was hoping to find a friend

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Norman, James, Sarah and Mandy get in trouble at sea when they attempt to be the first in Pontypandy to complete a new collecting game for mobile phones

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas heads to Brazil where he meets Marcio and Marcia, a pair of wood-burning engines who have never travelled beyond their eucalyptus railway

programme.title: Blue's Clues
programme.desc: Fun and games with the playful pup and her pal Kevin

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit persuades Mummy Pig to go to her relaxation class, but it proves more difficult than expected

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle tells the children all about wind power, then Mr Bull makes a lovely cup of tea made using the energy source

programme.title: Ricky Zoom
programme.desc: The buddies discover that Mrs Bikely is sleep biking, the bike equivalent of sleepwalking

programme.title: Pirata & Capitano
programme.desc: The crew finds a pirate frozen inside an iceberg - but once he has thawed out, he embarks on a reign of terror

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Mobile phones are vanishing all over Adventure Bay, and the pups will need a lot of police power to solve this mystery

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: The little bear decides to make a scrapbook of memories and tries to include all his friends to show Aunt Lucy

programme.title: Daisy & Ollie
programme.desc: The young friends play with Ollie's model boat in the park, causing them to wonder how sailing boats actually work

programme.title: Shane the Chef
programme.desc: Shane gives the children chopped vegetables to make self-portraits on a pizza for Penny's art exhibition

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: When Turbo finds a pair of new rugby boots, he wonders whether to run around a muddy field or keep them nice and clean

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Staffordshire, the agents chase up a £3,000 deposit owed by a landlord to his tenant, and officers in Birmingham try to recover £25,000 from a nightclub owner for unpaid solicitor fees. Meanwhile, agents Max and Paul are in Surrey as they attempt to collect more than £3,000 owed to a garage after a customer disputed the repairs made to his van

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Steve and David were once good friends, but are now embroiled in an ongoing dispute that started with a simple off-the-cuff remark and soon spiralled into an all-out war over the ownership of a hedge. Also featured is a man who sent some workmates round to the house of a former mayor to collect money for unpaid building work, but ended up on the wrong side of the law himself when she complained to the police about his behaviour

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ari and Tane are not happy about Bella moving in, despite Nikau's desperate pleas, and Colby's antics are becoming more obvious, to Mackenzie's shock

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: With Ned's exhibition approaching, Yashvi is bothered by Scarlett's involvement, and Dipi and Pierce are guilt-ridden during Shane's dinner party

programme.title: Don't Steal My Baby (2017)
programme.desc: A heavily pregnant woman befriends her new neighbour, who is also having a baby. They seem to have a lot in common and both look forward to their new arrivals. However, the second woman is faking her pregnancy in order to steal the first woman's baby. Thriller, starring Elisabeth Harnois and Anna Van Hooft

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe encounters a suicidal office worker during her first day as a telemarketer. Ross and Monica are upset to discover their parents intend to sell their childhood home, while Rachel and Chandler blame themselves for breaking Joey's favourite chair

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The pals celebrate Rachel's 30th birthday and reminisce about their own, including Monica's attempt to hide her intoxication from her parents, and Ross's embarrassing crisis, which resulted in the purchase of a red sports car. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: With Ned's exhibition approaching, Yashvi is bothered by Scarlett's involvement, and Dipi and Pierce are guilt-ridden during Shane's dinner party

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ari and Tane are not happy about Bella moving in, despite Nikau's desperate pleas, and Colby's antics are becoming more obvious, to Mackenzie's shock

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: QE2: The World's Most Luxurious Hotel
programme.desc: Documentary following life aboard the most famous ocean liner in the world, now a floating hotel in Dubai. Valentine's Day sees two big events happening on board - a lavish brunch for 450 people in the main dining room, followed by a romantic opera gala dinner out on deck. With guests paying top dollar for both, expectations are huge. However, a late delivery threatens to derail the brunch preparations and - adding to the presage of doom - a storm spotted on the horizon seems set to put the kibosh on the open-air element of the gathering

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Dr Qamar counsels a journalist named Zahid who has PTSD after being imprisoned and tortured in Afghanistan. Dr Williams sends Royston for a scan to look for signs of prostate cancer, although the patient is adamant it should not be before an upcoming fishing trip he has arranged. Dr Mao turns medical detective when patient Andrew describes a combination of numbness in his jaw and face, and a cannabis smoker complains of chest pains and shakes

programme.title: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Will is rushed in after being stabbed multiple times by several assailants. Dr Pickering must quickly work out the trajectory of the knives used and how severe his internal injuries are. Fiona, a 38-year-old mother, has had a severe stroke, and Dr Nayak must remove the clot inside her brain, while Ivan arrives in cardiac arrest. Despite lifesaving CPR, he remains in critical condition - so now he needs a trip heart bypass

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: The specialist clinic opens its doors to patients with acne, psoriasis and cysts. Dr Natalia Spierings treats 42-year-old Shaneef's shoulder lipoma, Dr Adil Sheraz tackles a large head cyst, and Dr Dev Shah comes under fire over his lack of music knowledge. Plus, psoriasis-sufferer John feels he's exhausted all the options for treatment, but can Dr Emma McMullen offer him a ray of hope?

programme.title: 101 Body Shockers
programme.desc: Counting down some of the most bizarre aspects of the human body, including fungal feet, crazy contorted limbs, outrageous body modification, and disgusting pimples and pus. The programme features a man who has decided the only way to deal with his revolting feet is to risk life and limb by cutting the hard skin from them with a razor blade. Plus, a woman who needed surgery after years of swallowing necklaces, bangles, anklets, earrings, nose rings and even a watch

programme.title: Big Body Squad
programme.desc: A man undergoes potentially life-altering gastric band surgery, while a 17- year-old whose weight has ballooned to 35 stone is put through his paces at a weight-loss camp.

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is forced to take a step back from work when his increasingly frail father Jackson begs him to help track down an old friend from the Second World War who does not have long left to live. Meanwhile, the rest of the team investigate the death of a marine sergeant who appears to have been caught in the crossfire during a bungled robbery, but Tony and Tim find evidence the victim may have been targeted. Crime drama, guest starring Ralph Waite (The Waltons), with Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Petty officer Jody Ray is killed by a hit-and-run driver and evidence points to staff sergeant Justin Dunne, whose guilt seems certain when DiNozzo and McGee find him washing a bloodstained knife when they go to arrest him. However, Dunne tells his lawyer Carrie Clark he was miles away in Falls Church at the time - stabbing bookmaker Donny Sullivan to death. Unable to reveal the truth to the NCIS team, Clark decides to check out the alibi herself. Crime drama, guest starring Salli Richardson-Whitfield (A Town Called Eureka)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An internal security breach forces NCIS to go into lockdown when a covert listening device is found in a pen belonging to Secretary of the Navy Sarah Porter. DiNozzo discovers that National Security Agency analyst Ellie Bishop wrote a report two years previously predicting the possibility of such an occurrence and she is brought in to assist with the investigation and track down the culprit. Guest starring Leslie Hope and Emily Wickersham

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice and Alistair Appleton visit Scraptoft in Leicester, where a five-bedroom house valued at £229,500 needs a makeover to enhance its appeal. The kitchen is transformed into the hub of family life and a lounge is converted into a dining room, while unfortunate colour clashes are toned down

programme.title: Appointment with Danger (1950)
programme.desc: A nun is targeted by two murderers when they realise she is the only witness to one of their killings, and it is up to postal inspector to protect her and bring the men to justice. Noir thriller, starring Phyllis Calvert, Alan Ladd and Paul Stewart

programme.title: The Naked Jungle (1954)
programme.desc: A tough South American cocoa plantation owner and his newly arrived mail-order bride are menaced by a huge column of ferocious killer ants destroying everything in their path. Thriller, starring Charlton Heston, Eleanor Parker and William Conrad

programme.title: Tiger Bay (1959)
programme.desc: A Polish sailor flees Cardiff's docklands after murdering his girlfriend in a jealous rage, initially unaware that a 12-year-old tomboy has witnessed the crime and has taken his abandoned gun to show off to her friends. However, he comes back to abduct the girl in a bid to keep her quiet - but the pair form a friendship and she tries to help him escape the police. Thriller, starring Hayley Mills in her film debut alongside her father John, with Horst Buchholz

programme.title: Run Wild, Run Free (1969)
programme.desc: Withdrawn, mute 10-year-old Philip is ignored by his parents and goes off to explore Dartmoor alone, where he meets a retired colonel who shares his knowledge of Devon's wildlife. Under the older man's nurturing tutelage, the boy begins to tame a wild white colt, but fate proffers a series of setbacks just as real progress is being made. Children's drama, starring John Mills, Mark Lester, Sylvia Syms and Bernard Miles

programme.title: Home Again (2017)
programme.desc: Five months after separating from her husband, Alice Kinney and her daughters relocate from New York to her childhood home in Los Angeles, which belonged to her late father, Oscar-winning film director John Kinney. Eventually things take an unexpected turn when she lets three young guys move in with her. Romantic comedy, starring Reese Witherspoon, Michael Sheen and Candice Bergen

programme.title: Been So Long (2018)
programme.desc: A dedicated single mother is charmed by a handsome yet troubled stranger on an unusual night on the town. Drama, starring Michaela Coel, Arinzé Kene and Mya Lewis

programme.title: The Wolverine (2013)
programme.desc: The former member of the X-Men is lured out of hiding and travels to Japan, where a dying businessman offers him the chance to give up his immortality for a normal life. He ends up robbed of his superhuman powers by a mysterious scientist and is forced to protect the tycoon's granddaughter from a secret conspiracy's assassins. Superhero adventure spin-off, starring Hugh Jackman and Tao Okamoto

programme.title: Red 2 (2013)
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Frank Moses reunites his squad of retired operatives for a vital mission. A devastatingly powerful new weapon has been stolen, and it falls to Frank's team to retrieve it - which means facing lethal assassins, terrorists and corrupt government officials out to steal the device. Action thriller sequel, starring Bruce Willis, Helen Mirren and John Malkovich

programme.title: Ride Lonesome (1959)
programme.desc: A bounty hunter captures young killer Billy John, but his real motive is not the cash reward - he has an old score to settle with his prisoner's brother Frank. As the journey to bring the murderer to justice gets under way, he is counting on a showdown with Frank and accepts the help of two outlaw gunmen for added protection, aware they will try to turn Billy John in themselves for the reward and a pardon. Western, with Randolph Scott, Lee Van Cleef, James Best, James Coburn and Pernell Roberts.

programme.title: Cottage to Let (1941)
programme.desc: A British inventor's revolutionary bombsight is set to have a positive impact on the war effort. However, military intelligence detects the Nazis are aware of the invention, while a plucky teenage cockney evacuated to the boffin's Scottish country estate sets out to expose a German spy ring. Second World War thriller, with Leslie Banks, John Mills, Alastair Sim and George Cole in his screen debut

programme.title: Distant Drums (1951)
programme.desc: An army officer mounts a daring raid through the treacherous Florida swamplands. His mission is to take on a group of marauding Seminole rebels, as well as the gun runners who have been supplying them with weapons, and rescue a group of settlers who have been taken hostage by the tribe. Western, starring Gary Cooper, Mari Aldon, Richard Webb, Ray Teal and Arthur Hunnicutt

programme.title: Robin and Marian (1976)
programme.desc: Outlaw Robin Hood returns to England after the Crusades and goes in search of his beloved Marian, who is now an abbess, and crosses swords once again with old enemy the Sheriff of Nottingham. Medieval adventure, starring Sean Connery, Audrey Hepburn, Robert Shaw, Nicol Williamson, Ronnie Barker, Denholm Elliott and Richard Harris

programme.title: Gods of Egypt (2016)
programme.desc: An ancient Egyptian god is driven into exile when his evil brother murders their father and seizes his throne. He enlists the aid of a human thief in restoring justice, and in return offers to help the mortal to bring his murdered lover back to life. Fantasy adventure, starring Nikolaj Coster-Waldau, Brenton Thwaites, Gerard Butler and Chadwick Boseman

programme.title: Belle (2013)
programme.desc: The illegitimate mixed-race daughter of a Royal Navy admiral is raised in the household of her great uncle, but is never entirely accepted in Georgian British society. She falls in love with an idealistic lawyer, and together they campaign against the slave trade. Fact-based period drama, starring Gugu Mbatha-Raw, Tom Wilkinson and Emily Watson

programme.title: Transporter 3 (2008)
programme.desc: Underworld courier Frank Martin's latest assignment involves transporting the kidnapped daughter of a crooked government minister across Europe on behalf of an eco-terrorist faction. However, a device will kill him if he leaves his car, thugs employed by the politician are out to murder him, and his passenger has a bad case of Stockholm syndrome. Action thriller sequel, with Jason Statham and Natalya Rudakova

programme.title: Random
programme.desc: Debbie Tucker Green's adaptation of her play about a family whose ordinary day is shattered by a single event. A couple and their two children go about their morning routines, but when the son is late for school it leads to a tragic event that will leave them devastated. The story unfolds in a stark studio setting, where Nadine Marshall (reprising her role from the stage production) acts out the inner thoughts of each character, and in the real world, where she and three other actors play the four family members. Also starring Daniel Kaluuya, Jay Byrd and Louis Mahoney

programme.title: Night Comes On (2019)
programme.desc: Angel Lamere is released from juvenile detention on the eve of her 18th birthday. Haunted by her past, she embarks on a journey with her 10-year-old sister that could destroy their future. Drama, starring Dominique Fishback, Tatum Marilyn Hall and Nastashia Fuller

programme.title: Hell Is for Heroes (1962)
programme.desc: A rebellious soldier defies orders to lead two men on a secret attack on a German pillbox, but his mission fails and the other two soldiers are killed. Court-martialled for his actions, he remains convinced his plan was sound and ignores the sentence to make a second attempt at destroying the emplacement. Second World War adventure, with Steve McQueen, James Coburn and Bobby Darin

programme.title: The Tin Star (1957)
programme.desc: A world-weary bounty hunter, formerly a sheriff, arrives in a small town where a newly-appointed lawman is struggling to keep the peace. When he learns of the mercenary's past, the inexperienced lawman seeks his help in learning the tricks of the trade so he can bring an outlaw gang to justice. Anthony Mann's Western, starring Henry Fonda, Anthony Perkins, Lee Van Cleef, Betsy Palmer and Michel Ray

programme.title: The Longest Day (1962)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama chronicling the planning and execution of the Allied landings in Normandy on June 6, 1944, from the differing perspectives of the British, German, French and American forces. Starring Richard Burton, Richard Todd, Kenneth More, Sean Connery, John Wayne, Robert Mitchum, Henry Fonda, Curt Jurgens, Roddy McDowall and Rod Steiger

programme.title: The Book Thief (2013)
programme.desc: A girl separated from her family is raised by foster parents in Nazi Germany, who instill in her a love of reading. She is horrified by the book burnings and tries to save volumes from the flames, while she and her adoptive family provide a safe hiding place for a Jewish boy. Drama based on Markus Zusak's novel, starring Sophie Nelisse, Geoffrey Rush and Emily Watson

programme.title: Hidden Figures (2016)
programme.desc: As the space race reaches fever pitch in the early 1960s, a trio of female African-American mathematicians attempt to overcome prejudice and find work with NASA. Their remarkable skills prove vital in getting an astronaut into orbit and bringing him safely back to Earth, but to realise their potential they must overcome deep-seated prejudice in the space programme and society as a whole. Fact-based drama, starring Taraji P Henson, Octavia Spencer, Janelle Monae and Kevin Costner

programme.title: Second Coming (2014)
programme.desc: A happily married woman is shocked to discover she is pregnant as it has been months since she slept with her husband. Afraid of her spouse's reaction, she tries to keep the news to herself, but she cannot hide the truth indefinitely. Drama, starring Nadine Marshall, Idris Elba and Kai Francis Lewis

programme.title: Lost & Found (2017)
programme.desc: Comedy drama following seven interconnecting stories set in and around a lost and found office at an Irish train station. Written, directed by and starring Liam O Mochain, with Norma Sheahan and Brendan Conroy

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina has trouble conjuring up a pair of rollerblades, so Aunt Hilda convinces her there is only one thing left to do - get a job and earn enough money to buy the real thing

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina is determined to prove she can use her magic for good and begins to meddle in other people's lives - but Salem warns her that terrible things can occur as a consequence

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney is relieved that a woman he slept with is not pregnant, and creates a new holiday to celebrate not being a father. However, Lily and Marshall are contemplating having children, and ask Ted and Robin to help them decide what to do

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney tries to persuade his boss to hire Ted to redesign the office building, while an unemployed Robin starts hanging out with 'woo girls', a name the gang members give to single women who shout a lot on nights out. Cobie Smulders and Alyson Hannigan star

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: JJ makes friends with the cool kids and takes part in the time-honoured tradition of pranking their rival school with a little help from Kenneth, but JJ is crestfallen when he can't accompany his friends to the Homecoming bonfire, as the location isn't wheelchair-accessible. This forces Maya to spring into action, which further alienates JJ. Meanwhile, Ray struggles with the constant clutter in the house and Dylan is blindsided when Kenneth casually points out the real reason why she's such an avid runner

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Exploring the city on their own, JJ and Kenneth realise that strangers see them as inspirational. The two push their luck, receiving free food and admission to a baseball game, but things soon fall apart. Meanwhile, as the family can't usually do anything without having to consider wheelchair accessibility, Dylan and Ray convince Maya to take them paintballing while JJ is out - but can Maya allow herself to have fun without JJ?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's mother visits and he is horrified to learn that Sheldon knows more than he does about his own family, including his parents' impending divorce and the death of his dog. Guest starring Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj lusts after a girl he and Sheldon meet at a university party, and Leonard comes to regret airing his disapproval of Penny's belief in psychics. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam's girlfriend Jackie returns after spending the summer in New York and seems like a different person. After receiving some bad advice from his loved ones, Adam takes drastic measures to hold on to his relationship. Beverly is not happy with Lainey's domestic skills and decides to teach her future daughter-in-law a thing or two about family catering

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica thinks that all her singing dreams are about to come true when she lands a job at the new karaoke bar in town. However, when she is tasked with bringing in more customers, she is forced to ask Beverly for help. Meanwhile, Murray tries to teach Barry and Lainey how to be financially responsible adults. Rick Springfield guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of two. A prison van crash sees a mass escape of convicts take place and the entire squad has to track the villains down. Peralta and Santiago make a bet on which of them can bring in the most escaped prisoners, with the loser forced to move into the winner's apartment when they start living together. Former American football star Marshawn Lynch guests

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part two of two. Only one fugitive remains on the loose on the streets of Brooklyn after the mass escape of convicts from the prison van and Peralta is forced to enlist a surprising ally in order to apprehend him. Elsewhere, Santiago and Gina attempt to introduce Boyle to proper texting etiquette. Craig Robinson guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon receives a nasty surprise when he visits his mother in Houston, while Raj's murder mystery party causes conflict for the rest of the gang members. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is racked with guilt when he tries to date Lucy and Emily at the same time, Penny has trouble deciding whether to take a role in a film, and Sheldon struggles to choose between two gaming systems. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD's blossoming romance takes second place to his hectic work schedule, while Turk and Carla have relationship problems of their own. Dr Cox tries to give the interns the confidence to face up to Dr Kelso. Comedy, starring Zach Braff and Donald Faison

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD is forced to take sides when his new girlfriend causes friction with Elliot, while Turk is taken aback to discover Dr Cox has more than a passing interest in Carla. Comedy, starring Zach Braff and Donald Faison

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: When Maya is ill, Jimmy is forced to become the mother of the house, and Dylan acts as Kenneth's replacement when he gets sick too. Jimmy does surprisingly well handling Maya's day-to-day duties but tries to keep this from her to avoid hurting her feelings. Meanwhile, JJ protects Dylan from a boy she's interested in, and the family band together to pull an all-nighter to finish Ray's science project

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Maya tries to give Jimmy a Valentine's Day gift, with the help of his old room-mate - who is also her ex-fiance. Ray is overjoyed to find out he has a secret admirer, and JJ is charged with distributing Valentine's Day sweets at school

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz learn there's more to Lt Melanie Hawkins' team than meets the eye as they continue their search for the gang of bank robbers. Jeffords, Boyle and Santiago begin to suspect that Gina is harbouring a secret. Ryan Phillippe, Gina Gershon and Jason Mantzoukas guest star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta and Diaz are framed for a crime they didn't commit, it's up to the other members of the Nine-Nine to find out what really happened and try to save them from going to jail

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray and Geoff team up to pull Beverly, Barry and Erica out of their shared misery that Lainey has left town. Adam's dread of gym class is amplified when Coach Mellor's brother, Coach Nick, arrives and uses fear as a motivator. Meanwhile, Coach Mellor prepares for the next stage in his career

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly decides their street needs another stop sign and pleads her case to the city comptroller. Barry panics when he realises he's neglected his college applications, while Erica struggles with her career choice

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's girlfriend Emily (Laura Spencer) gives Penny the cold shoulder when she learns about his past. Meanwhile, the guys debate investing in Stuart's comic-book shop and becoming part owners of the business. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is forced to revise for a work assessment during the girls' trip to Las Vegas, and Amy and Bernadette accuse her of spoiling their fun. Meanwhile, the guys try to invent something of scientific importance - but only come up with new ways to procrastinate. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jorgie Porter hosts the second dinner party, arranging a living room block party inspired by 1990s hip hop and RnB, serving up a menu of cordon bleu beans on toast

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets tasks for Roisin Conaty, Tim Key, Romesh Ranganathan, Frank Skinner and Josh Widdicombe. They have to identify the contents of a table full of mystery pies, make a film backwards and high five a 55 year old. Alex Horne helps coax the contestants to reveal how comic, creative and seriously competitive they are

programme.title: X-Men: The Last Stand (2006)
programme.desc: The mutant heroes return to face a battle on three fronts. Arch-enemy Magneto is back with an army of followers, while a corporation has created a drug that permanently robs mutants of their powers. Meanwhile, their former ally Jean Grey has returned from the dead as the destructive and seemingly unstoppable Phoenix. Third instalment of the superhero saga, starring Hugh Jackman, Ian McKellen, Famke Janssen, Halle Berry and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Buffy needs something normal in her life, so, much to Giles's horror, she auditions for the school's cheerleading squad. A series of unpleasant accidents disrupts the try-outs, leading to suspicions that a witch is using black magic to eliminate the competition. A girl under pressure from her former cheerleader mother seems the most likely suspect - but the truth is far stranger

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Cordelia believes a scroll predicts Angel's death, but before she can do anything about it she is cursed by a demon hired by the dastardly lawyers at Wolfram & Hart. Meanwhile, Lindsey and his colleagues work on summoning another creature to plague the soulful vampire. Supernatural drama, starring David Boreanaz and Charisma Carpenter

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon, Howard and Raj discover actress Summer Glau is on their train while travelling to San Francisco. Desperate to discuss the Terminator TV series with her, the friends devise a number of plans to engage her in conversation. With Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny starts her own hair accessories business and the orders start to pile in. However, she makes the mistake of asking Sheldon to help, leading to frustration and regret. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: After a delay of six months, Rick unfreezes time hoping that everything will return to normal, but warns Morty and Summer not to touch Jerry and Beth in case unstable timelines cause parallel dimensions to develop. However, the youngsters' feelings of uncertainty fracture time and split reality, leaving them lost in oblivion with Rick

programme.title: Gogglebox

Dick comes up with an ingenious solution to stop wedding cakes from melting in the heat, but it involves piercing the chateau's walls. The moat is transformed into a boating lake, giving visitors a chance to cool down, and the family takes to the water in a home-made punt

programme.title: Building the Dream

While midwife Liz likes traditional houses, accountant Craig favours contemporary styles, and when the build veers towards the modern, Liz struggles to stay engaged. However, Charlie is worried that the pair are making some big mistakes when it comes to the building's eco-features

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at stately home Anstey Hall in Cambridge, with father and son team John and Johnny de Bruyne. The fun starts with a character-revealing afternoon of goose-herding, before the participants dress to impress at a formal dinner. John recounts stories of royal connections - which fails to impress hotel managers Mark and Layla. In the morning, as they tuck in to a self-service breakfast, guest Tim decides that DIY doesn't work at Anstey Hall, but when he notes this on his feedback form, John and Johnny accuse him of game-playing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the competition is to clothes-free Clover Spa and Hotel in Birmingham, where owner Tim Higgs hopes to convert his rivals to the joys of naturism. Judging with an extra critical eye are John and Jonny De Bruyne, who received negative feedback from Tim, and a thorough room inspection reveals a dusty porn DVD. Tim tries to encourage his nervous guests to take part in a naked spa experience, but John opts to watch television instead. When feedback is invited, Tim is delighted to discover Mark and Layla would stay again but shocked by the 'porn film' discovery

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Angel Hotel in Coleford, Gloucestershire for the third day of the competition, where a treasure hunt organised by hosts Mark and Layla brings out their guests' competitive sides. Meanwhile, there is confusion at breakfast and Layla's manners are criticised

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Higher Gitcombe in Totnes, Devon, where owners Paul and Lynnie Jolly set out to spoil their guests. Everyone is overwhelmed by the added extras, but naturist Tim is put off by cushions and clutter. After a masterclass in Nordic walking, Lynnie serves up a veg smoothie, which unhealthy eaters Mark and Layla dubiously down in one. Over dinner, Tim challenges his host's organic 'niche'. And Layla, still smarting from his negative feedback, labels him 'weird, naked Tim'. At breakfast, guests are wary as Tim's order goes wrong and Jonny and Layla engage in an eating competition. When feedback is invited, the Jollys are affronted by accusations of special treatment and vow to put the record straight

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the final day of the competition, the owners of Anstey Hall, the Clover Spa and Hotel, the Angel Hotel and Higher Gitcombe meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Having aired their issues, the winners are announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: At Chester Zoo, Rothschild giraffe Tula is a week overdue after a 13-month pregnancy. But keepers are anxious that history could repeat itself - she gave birth to a stillborn calf last year. Cameras also follow this year's brood of penguin chicks. They are about to face the ordeal of joining the main pool, where they must compete for fish with the adult penguins. And baby silvery gibbon Eko learns how to swing between ropes - 50 feet up

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: The wedding season draws to close, but Dick and Angel need to look ahead to the winter. Dick ploughs up the wild flower meadow, a change that Angel does not entirely approve of, and the couple transforms the dilapidated coach house into a cafe, complete with a striking neon sign

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Couple Phil Davidson and Ariana Evans give themselves just two weeks to construct their new home in beachside Maianbar, south of Sydney, despite the fact that they have never built anything before. They're utilising a building system that has never been employed for domestic housing in Australia, and could turn out to be either a new blueprint for swift construction or a disaster

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Brighton couple Daren Howarth and Adi Nortje, who want to build an earth-sheltered home from recycled materials, based on ideas pioneered in New Mexico in the 1970s. However, land prices and planning laws have forced the pair out of England and into Brittany. To keep costs down, Daren and Adi enlist the help of unskilled volunteers to work on the house, in exchange for teaching them the construction techniques

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The hospital documentary returns, focusing on the stories of two motorcyclists, which reveal how the bonds between loved ones can be strengthened through adversity. Prezmek may have life-changing spinal injuries following a high-speed motorcycle crash on the M4, forcing his wife Tatia to reflect on how their plans for the future may have to change. Teenager Leon undergoes a CT scan after crashing into a central reservation. While waiting for the results, his mother Janey thinks back to his school days

programme.title: Shut-Ins: Britain's Fattest People
programme.desc: Documentary following the struggle of three severely morbidly obese people as they attempt to regain control of their lives before it is too late. Claire has been bed-bound for the last six years. Trapped by her 40-stone body, she can only see the world through the window of the room where she spends her life. Claire has two daughters - Tracey and Jasmine - who need to do nearly everything for her. Tracey has two young children and a home of her own, so the burden of care falls mainly on 19-year-old Jasmine. The programme tracks the family's journey as local surgeon Nick Carter battles to get Clare the help she needs

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show, with Sean Lock and Henning Wehn taking on guest captain Bill Bailey and Jessica Hynes. Susie Dent is joined by Tom Allen in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The hospital documentary returns, focusing on the stories of two motorcyclists, which reveal how the bonds between loved ones can be strengthened through adversity. Prezmek may have life-changing spinal injuries following a high-speed motorcycle crash on the M4, forcing his wife Tatia to reflect on how their plans for the future may have to change. Teenager Leon undergoes a CT scan after crashing into a central reservation. While waiting for the results, his mother Janey thinks back to his school days

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Staffordshire bull terrier requires attention when it suffers complete paralysis in its back legs, and a Devon rex cat is brought in after being struck by a car. Its eight-year-old owner faces a tough decision when X-rays reveal a severely broken pelvis and a ruptured bladder. Plus, a young cavalier king has had seven operations in a bid to fix its knee joint, and Noel tries to resolve the problem

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt heads to Italy to find out how supermarkets can sell pesto at an affordable price when the traditional ingredients are expensive, while Jimmy Doherty investigates why so many cockles in UK supermarkets come from abroad when he always thought of them as a quintessentially British staple. Kate Quilton takes a trip around Europe's largest marshmallow factory to find out why the sticky treat goes crispy and melty at the same time over the campfire

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Master sculptor and gilder Adam Williamson teaches Kirstie Allsop how to apply gold leaf to a second-hand picture frame to give it a luxury look and feel

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton goes house-hunting on the Greek island of Corfu with Simon and Andrea from Manchester, who want a holiday home to share with their sons and grandsons

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to the Chiltern Hills in Buckinghamshire to meet Adam and Mandy, who run a classic car restoration business. Henry uncovers an anvil, while Simon finds an old brown dresser, which he thinks could become a wildlife sanctuary for birds and insects

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel across the UK to find unique and valuable items languishing in people's homes and use creative thinking and elbow grease to fix them up to turn a profit for their owners. Here they unearth a church pew, create a fish tank from scrap and uncover a special petrol tank

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: The wedding season draws to close, but Dick and Angel need to look ahead to the winter. Dick ploughs up the wild flower meadow, a change that Angel does not entirely approve of, and the couple transforms the dilapidated coach house into a cafe, complete with a striking neon sign

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton helps Mandy and Tony Slater to build their dream home directly opposite their old one in the Cotswolds, but the groundworks threaten to derail their modest budget

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Four sets of campsite proprietors battle it out to be named best value, with the competition beginning at Amber's Bell Tent Camping in Mannington, Norfolk

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second day of the competition is at Park Farm Camping and Caravan Site in Norfolk, where husband and wife team Derek and Julie Nice are proud to show off their budget, family-friendly site. Former marksman Derek treats his guests to a spot of clay pigeon shooting, bringing out his competitive side

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to 500-year-old Layer Marney Tower in Essex for the third day of the competition, where they are welcomed into luxury glamping lodges by Nick and Sheila Charrington. The guests have little to complain about with the accommodation, but a revelation over dinner changes how they see things. Plus, a treasure hunt organised by the hosts sends one team on a wild goose chase

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Day four is at the Foxhunter Park in Kent, where brother and sister Jane Stacey and Russell Saunders own a caravan site that includes a bistro and entertainment. The accommodation is luxurious but the large scale of the site does not sit well with the campers - and the evening entertainment of a fire-eating limbo dancer leaves most of them cold

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The campers meet for the final time to find out what they thought one another's stay was worth. Amber is offended by Derek's low scoring, while he is thrown by Nick and Sheila's feedback. Russell and Jane have an axe to grind with Derek whose low scoring of their park is made worse by what they see as a personal attack on their hosting, while Nick and Sheila appear to emerge relatively unscathed

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester's 18 chimpanzees face upheaval when new female chimp Vila arrives from a zoo in Germany. Meanwhile, nine-year-old cheetah mum Kinky Tail is vomiting after meals, and her three-year-old daughter Safi must watch and wait as her mum is taken to the zoo's medical centre. Cameras also follow Asian short-clawed otter Annie, who recently gave birth to a large litter of five pups

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: As autumn sets in, Dick and Angel harvest their pumpkins in the walled garden and organise a family wheelbarrow race. The basement is the latest room to be transformed, serving as a nerve centre for the whole chateau, a space for storing deliveries, and Dick's workshop. The old piggery is also renovated, in anticipation of some new arrivals

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Peter Maddison meets Nick and Nicole New from Queensland, who have given an architect the job of creating a house that is sympathetic to the dense rainforest surrounding their land

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets dairy farmer Andrew Ainslie and his artist wife Meryl in Marlborough, Wiltshire. Their current house is separate from their land, so they want to build a new home close to their 200-head herd of cattle. The project involves constructing an ultra-modern barn-like building from engineered timber, with a barrel-shaped zinc roof, which will combine functionality with high-finish craftsmanship

programme.title: The Kennedys: Tragedy & Triumph
programme.desc: John F Kennedy launches a long shot bid for power, but the seemingly perfect candidate is hiding dark secrets that could damage his political future

programme.title: Catching a Killer
programme.desc: When elderly teacher Peter Farquhar was found dead at home in the village of Maids Moreton in 2015, it was sad and unexpected, but no one thought it suspicious. But 18 months later, when his neighbour Ann Moore-Martin also fell ill and died, the police decided to look again. They found that Ben Field, a would-be vicar and academic, had recently become part of both of their lives and benefited from their wills. This programme shows that by delving back in time through friends' and loved ones' memories of Peter and Ben's relationship, as well as Peter's diary, the police discovered a story of love and betrayal

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Fifty-nine-year-old Charulata is rushed to A&E after collapsing at home with signs of a stroke. She has a history of strokes, diabetes, and is awaiting a heart bypass, so doctors send her for a CT scan to find out what has happened. Twenty-eight-year-old carpenter Luke - who has epilepsy - arrives after cutting his finger at work. Although his girlfriend Stacy says it looks like a paper cut, he is worried it may trigger a seizure. Meanwhile, 75-year-old Anne comes to St George's after falling and hurting her arm on holiday

programme.title: Shocking Emergency Calls
programme.desc: A dramatic 911 call reveals that a helicopter crash has taken place as wealthy entrepreneur Charles Burnett III and his friends fly to his ranch in New Mexico

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick pushes the boundaries of veterinary medicine, and treats a German shepherd puppy that needs surgery on his hips and front leg using groundbreaking cell treatment. The vet must also perform delicate surgery on a chihuahua suffering from a neck deformity compressing its spinal cord - however, one false move could be fatal. Plus, a rescue dog with deformed front legs is brought into the surgery

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Building the Dream

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Swallows Rest in Weymouth, Dorset, where hosts Jane and Keith Smith are pulling out all the stops to win. However, the colour combinations in the rooms do not go down well with rival B&B owner Ray Chowdhury, and an afternoon of drawing starts some competition between Ray and newlyweds James and Darren Kosa-Jones

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the Burley Inn in the New Forest, where newlyweds Darren and James welcome their guests. Donna and David prove to have a critical eye when they discover holes in the sheets, and Jane and Keith have a disagreement over a toilet roll. In the afternoon, the couple reveal their quizmaster skills, before Ray grills them on how they run their B&B over dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Hotel Montville in Redditch, Worcestershire for the third day of the competition, where first impressions of Ray Chowdhury's unique style and decor are positive. However, room inspections leave Jane and Keith Smith threatening not to stay, and the guests grill their host about his business background at dinner. Although some light relief is given in the form of ice sculpting, breakfast disappoints James and Darren Kosa-Jones, and Ray must face the harsh reality of his guests' opinions at feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit is to Donna and David's Silverton B&B in Shrewsbury, where the complimentary earplugs soon have Darren and James worrying about the noise from the road outside. A Segway race helps whip up the guests' competitive spirit, Donna gets emotional when her work-life balance is questioned, and chef David proves he can handle the unexpected at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Accusations fly around the table as payments are revealed and the winner announced. Swallows Rest is first up and hosts Jane and Keith want to find out about Ray's colour preferences. Next Darren and James of the Burley Inn quiz Ray over his fussiness around their pine furniture. When it comes to the Silverton, B&B team Donna and David take umbrage with Jane and Keith's comments

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: An elephant calf is born at Chester Zoo, but its young half-sister doesn't welcome the new arrival. Meanwhile, bush dog dad Franco is under pressure as its family grows, and an onager - a rare type of wild horse - faces a major operation

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree enter their fifth year of living in France. With more weddings and events booked in than ever, the couple prepare for their busiest year yet. In order to feed a total of 1,500 guests, Dick and Angel begin renovating the back of the basement, creating a brand new, state-of-the-art events kitchen. Engineer Dick faces a complicated plumbing issue and there's a kitchen design challenge for Angel

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Anglican priests Neil and Ruth Mathieson share a love of all things Gothic and medieval. So when they decided to build their first-ever family home in the Adelaide suburb of Hillbank, it was no surprise that the City of Churches would provide plenty of ideas. Neil wanted a barn-inspired house with big, heavy timber beams so they chose to create a medieval manor built in the traditional way using methods from another time

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Mimi and Andre d'Costa, who have moved to the Kent countryside to bring up their two children. They have a large plot of land and want to build a house that will be functional enough to serve their young family, but will also blend in with the beautiful landscape. They turn to architect Nick Eldridge, who designs a simple modular home using state-of-the-art materials and technologies

programme.title: Billion Pound Cruise
programme.desc: Daily life on the mammoth cruise ship the Symphony of the Seas, which boasts 20 pools and jacuzzis, two surf simulators, a rock-climbing wall, an ice rink, a basketball court and a mini golf course. It's all hands on deck for the crew members as 6,680 passengers arrive for the holiday of a lifetime

programme.title: Million Pound Mega Yachts
programme.desc: Documentary about the Monaco Yacht Show, where over 100 of the largest yachts on the water are up for sale, with billionaire buyers competing to own the most extravagant vessels. The programme follows those who make, buy and work on these craft, including a Soho businessman planning to sail around the world, a broker with 25 years experience looking to sell a £130 million yacht, and a billionaire installing a crystal chandelier in his floating palace

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Tom is rushed to St George's after crashing his bike head first into a parked car while racing a friend. Doctors order a CT scan to assess his injuries and must decide whether he will need emergency surgery to his face. Plus, 26-year-old Andy comes to A&E after injuring his knee during a game of Frisbee, and 51-year-old Jason arrives after suffering from blurred vision for two days

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Sara Pascoe taking on Jon Richardson and Josh Widdicombe. Susie Dent is joined by Alex Horne and the Horne Section in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: The Accident
programme.desc: Harriet is in the dock for gross negligence manslaughter as the families' private prosecution finally arrives in court. Angela and the others have nearly bankrupted themselves to fund the case. Will it all have been worth it? Polly fears for Leona, who wants to give evidence, but it is her relationship with Iwan that presents her with the most challenging questions. Final episode of Jack Thorne's drama, starring Sarah Lancashire, Joanna Scanlan, Mark Lewis Jones and Sidse Babbett Knudsen

programme.title: Billion Pound Cruise

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

Their route takes in 2,000ft drops, one-lane dirt roads, remote mountain trails and muddy, humid jungle terrain, as they search for the lost city of Constitucion, once destined to be the capital of Peru

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team sets off on a high-altitude trek from Kathmandu, capital of Nepal, to the Forbidden City of Lo Manthang, a secretive kingdom perched high on the Tibetan plateau, on the far side of the Himalayas. On a five-day expedition through the highest mountains, deepest gorges and harshest terrain on the planet, Paddy McGuinness, Freddie Flintoff and Chris Harris battle huge river crossings, vast mudslides and dizzying mountain passes on a trip that would test even the hardiest new 4x4s to the limit. But Paddy, Freddie and Chris aren't crossing the Himalayas in new 4x4s. They're crossing the Himalayas in a small old Peugeot, a very compact old Renault, and Nepal's first (and only) home-built car

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Gareth Malone becomes the latest celebrity to dig into his family's past in the popular genealogy show. The choirmaster knows he got the singing bug from his parents, who met while acting together in musicals, and now he wants to know how far back this love of the stage goes. He starts out by looking into his mother's side of the family and strikes gold immediately as his investigations take him to the West End. Along the way, he uncovers tales of the heyday of music hall, a theatre impresario in Dublin and even a performance for King George V

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Actress Anne Reid is keen to find out about her father's family, but only has a couple of clues to go on - the name of a house in Scotland and an old story that his ancestors were ministers in the church. This puts her on the trail of her great-great-grandfather John Reid in Fife, who turns out to have been a teacher and not a minister. However, he also had a less-honest sideline which takes the story in an altogether different direction

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston looks at the life and work of Serbian inventor Nikola Tesla, investigating conspiracy theories that the scientific establishment and national governments covered up his work on energy sources. He also finds out why so little evidence of his experiments remains today

programme.title: WW2 - Battles for Europe
programme.desc: As the Allies' advances stall, the Canadians seize Hitler's island fortress to open up the vital port of Antwerp and keep the war moving

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents an episode from RAF Coningsby, an operational air base in Lincolnshire, where she takes to the sky in a Dakota aircraft and examines some air force memorabilia including a teddy bear that was on board one of the Dambuster planes and designs for the Vulcan bomber. Items brought in to be valued include a painting by John Singer Sergeant, a crystal decanter and an officer's coat from the American Civil War

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The story of how a town established by Henry Ford in the 1920s has been left to rot in the Amazonian rainforest. Plus, Mysterious monoliths scattered over a Polish forest

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Gainsborough to Ely, along the way learning about a Victorian machine that changed shopping for ever and the poet Alfred Tennyson

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the final leg of his journey following the route of the North Country Continental service. Along the way he meets volunteers on the Mid-Suffolk Light railway and is permitted to drive 'The Middy'. In Leiston, Michael uncovers the world's first purpose-built assembly line, while in Ipswich the work of a young Victorian engineering prodigy impresses the ex-politician. At his destination of Harwich the presenter discovers how the port became a gateway to the continent, only to be superseded by a new deep-water port further inland

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Broughton Castle, near Banbury, Oxfordshire. Plus, Philip Mould meets a tax inspector who was paid in paintings by several artists

programme.title: Impossible Engineering

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit the Royal William Yard in Plymouth, where they are given the chance to cast their eyes over a number of potentially valuable items. The team is impressed by a chess set made from parts of the aircraft carrier HMS Ark Royal, and a psychedelic painting of a band that performed at Woodstock intrigues Clive Stewart-Lockhart. Plus, jewellery specialist John Benjamin marvels at a diamond necklace the length of a skipping rope, donated to the city of Plymouth by Lady Astor

programme.desc: Debra is upset at Ray's reaction to a friend's breast enlargement, and decides to play a trick on him to see if he really is happy with her body the way it is. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef heads to the Seascape restaurant in the village of Islip on Long Island, New York, in a bid to change the fortunes of its owner, who is nearly $1million in debt. Gordon is dismayed to discover unprotected meat and fish left next to mouldy pesto jars in the kitchen and plans to close down the eatery until radical changes are made

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

With the team way behind schedule, two new arrivals make a surprise entry into the camp

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: The idyllic village of Hartley Wintney is often voted one of the best places to live in Britain - but every rose has its thorn. Fiona and Hugh's ugly Hampshire home has not been touched in decades, and they hate absolutely everything except the garden. They have £180,000 budget to transform the entire house, so George enlists award-winning architect Greg Blee. However, while the owners buy into his modernist scheme the local planners do not. Can he salvage his design and come up with a scheme that will tick all the boxes?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

Shelly is a 57-year-old personal trainer who has been single for seven years. Her date is David, a 61-year-old retired firefighter who's been single for four years. Father-of-two Nathan has had a successful career in sales. His date Lisa seeks someone 'nicer' than the guys she usually dates. Last into the restaurant is 27-year-old steampunk enthusiast Joe. His date is 29-year-old Jess, who used to work at the Black Country Living Museum

programme.title: Five Guys a Week

A grandmother by the age of 40, she's always devoted her time and energy to her family. However, now they've all flown the nest, she wants to put herself first for a change. Prompted by this desire, she invites a globe-trotting sales executive, a cycling enthusiast, a removals company boss, a fitness enthusiast and a forklift driver to move in with her, hoping that one of them can prove a partner for life

Kathy loves the wild shores of Pembrokeshire in west Wales, while Gerry is inspired by the crystal waters of the Greek island of Zakynthos. Going head to head to find them their dream property is Jasmine Harman in the UK and Jonnie Irwin in Greece. Each has a £200,000 budget to play with and three amazing options to line up

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.desc: The award-winning celebrity challenge comes to Channel 4, with Greg Davies as the all-powerful Taskmaster and Alex Horne (the show's creator) as his sidekick, setting all manner of perplexing and downright extraordinary tasks for five contestants from the comedy world - Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Daisy May Cooper, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring. They'll be facing giant bears, disappearing cows and flying eggs as they begin their campaign to win the ultimate prize - Greg's golden head

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: An edition focusing on the behaviour of teenage boys, with frontline staff in Northamptonshire and across the country saying they are becoming more violent. PC Kathleen Roberts responds to a suspected acid attack carried out by a teenager in Northampton, while Sgt Martin Waller is dispatched to the scene of a suspected gang-related stabbing

programme.title: Diana: The Truth Behind the Interview
programme.desc: Piecing together the story behind Diana, Princess of Wales' November 1995 explosive interview with BBC's Panorama, 25 years on from the momentous broadcast. The programmes revelations stunned the world, painted the monarchy as cruel and oppressive, and put its future in jeopardy. Now, insiders at the BBC, and those who knew and worked closely with the Princess, along with archive documents, reveal the truth behind the historic interview

programme.title: Trump's Coronavirus Catastrophe
programme.desc: Matt Frei investigates the president's policies, actions and decisions during the pandemic, which has cost more than 200,000 American lives. There are revelations gathered from months of conversations with White House advisers and insiders, whistle-blowers, politicians who have worked with Trump and leading US scientists, as well as loyal Trump supporters

programme.title: Mo Gilligan: Black, British and Funny
programme.desc: Mo Gilligan goes on a journey through his comedy roots, shining a light on some of the artists who are part of the vibrant British black comedy circuit, and questioning why they have often never achieved mainstream success. Mo features pioneers of the scene such as Angie Le Mar, the veteran comic from The Real McCoy who was the first female black comedian to have a sell-out show in London's West End. He also meets the multi-award-winning Slim, who inspired Mo to take up comedy, and breakout stars such as Michael Dapaah, who plays spoof rapper Big Shaq

programme.title: Autumn at Jimmy's Farm
programme.desc: Following life on Jimmy Doherty's farm during the autumn months, as the team prepare the farm and wildlife park for the oncoming seasonal changes. In the second episode, the team work flat out as the prepare for the births of two dozen piglets, and take delivery of 6,000 turkeys

programme.title: The Bridge

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Police officer Claire Crank hosts the second round of the contest in Stoke-on-Trent, and insists on stripping the event to the basics of good food. However, Tracey Durrant declares she only likes the best-quality beef, and determines to refuse to eat the hostess's offerings before she has even arrived at the party

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty parlour owner Michelle Minter delivers a gourmet menu at the penultimate dinner party in Stoke-on-Trent, featuring crostini with pork fillet and mushroom pate, and a twice-baked souffle. The atmosphere is tense after last night's argument, so everyone is relieved when Tracey gets stuck in traffic and they have to start without her

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: City councillor Matt Wilcox hosts the final dinner party in Stoke-on-Trent, hoping to impress with unusual dishes including a bucket of bones and his spicy twist on a local stew. programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray make their wills, but struggle to pick guardians for the children. They finally manage to decide - but not everyone is happy about the arrangement. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is upset by her hippie sister's decision to become a nun, and resolves to prove her new-found faith is just a phase. Comedy, starring Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their 'authentic' Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Lela's, a California restaurant that is currently being run into the ground by its inexperienced owner. Gordon tries to turn the failing business around, but faces opposition from the chef and makes enemies when he exposes the suspect behaviour of some members of staff

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: With their children flying the nest, Andy and Alida have decided now is the time to fulfil their dream of buying a chalet in the French Alps. They are downsizing their house in Wokingham, Surrey, and splitting the funds between the UK and France, so Laura Hamilton and Jonnie Irwin have been sent on a joint mission. With a total of £650,000 to spend, and three shots each to find the perfect property - Laura in Berkshire and Jonnie in the ski-resort of Morzine - the pressure is really on for both of them to deliver

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
