programme.title: Autumn at Jimmy's Farm
programme.desc: Following life on Jimmy Doherty's farm during the autumn months, as the team prepare the farm and wildlife park for the incoming seasonal changes

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: An edition focusing on the behaviour of teenage boys, with frontline staff in Northamptonshire and across the country saying they are becoming more violent. PC Kathleen Roberts responds to a suspected acid attack carried out by a teenager in Northampton, while Sgt Martin Waller is dispatched to the scene of a suspected gang-related stabbing

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The award-winning celebrity challenge comes to Channel 4, with Greg Davies as the all-powerful Taskmaster and Alex Horne (the show's creator) as his sidekick, setting all manner of perplexing and downright extraordinary tasks for five contestants from the comedy world - Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Daisy May Cooper, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring. They'll be facing giant bears, disappearing cows and flying eggs as they begin their campaign to win the ultimate prize - Greg's golden head

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: Five Guys a Week

A grandmother by the age of 40, she's always devoted her time and energy to her family. However, now they've all flown the nest, she wants to put herself first for a change. Prompted by this desire, she invites a globe-trotting sales executive, a cycling enthusiast, a removals company boss, a fitness enthusiast and a forklift driver to move in with her, hoping that one of them can prove a partner for life

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul Bohill and Phil Short must deal with a negligent tenant who fled upon their arrival, forcing the agents to set a trap in order to evict him. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart McCracken and Elmore Victor head to Liverpool for what they expect to be a routine repossession, but instead face the most challenging eviction of their careers. Behind the front door, they find a critically ill two-year-old child with major heart problems, who is on constant life support and unable to breathe without a ventilator. Meanwhile, Brian O'Shaughnessy and Del Anglin chase £2,000 worth of debt owed by a business based in Kent, and recover £4,000 from a recycling business in Buckinghamshire. Plus, Stewart and Elmore encounter another family in crisis in Birmingham, where a retired couple who acted as guarantor for their daughter's tenancy are liable to pay over £3,000 after she defaulted

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called in to identify the charred remains of a woman caught in an apartment block fire, which was started deliberately. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Southerlyn battle the lawyers over the fatal shooting of an uninvited nightclub guest who was seen confronting popular rap star Darry 'G-Trane' moments before the murder. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Elisabeth Rohm

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a publishing executive last seen engaged in a heated argument over a taxi. They learn that the killing may have been a race hate crime, with their main suspect having a long history of prejudice. However, a technicality arises in the case, threatening to deny them the conviction. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team looks into a raid on a naval base, and Dr Cyril Taft - the surgeon who saved Gibbs' life - experiences the thrill of assisting on an investigation. Assigned to treat Gibbs' suspect, Taft manages to uncover evidence that may prove crucial to solving the case. Meanwhile, DiNozzo pays his old flame Jeanne Benoit a visit as he chases a lead involving doctors in Sudan. Guest starring John Cryer and Scottie Thompson

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An American couple are attacked in Iraq, in the very same spot a group of US Special Ops snipers were ambushed six months earlier. Determined to get to the bottom of the case, Gibbs is forced to speak to Aaron Davis, the only survivor of the first assault, who is now struggling through PTSD at the Walter Reed Medical Centre. The 300th episode of the military crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Torres boldly breaks protocol when he learns a witness in an NCIS case is wanted by US Immigration and Customs Enforcement. Meanwhile, Bishop and McGee hope to sublet Tony's apartment - by wooing his father, landlord Tony DiNozzo Sr. Robert Wagner guest stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ellie questions her previous work at the NSA after she is sent to Gitmo to gather evidence for a Navy chaplain murder case. Meanwhile, Bishop's brothers visit for the Thanksgiving holiday and pester her co-workers to find out who she is dating

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames' investigation into the murder of an undertaker leads them to discover a field of decomposed corpses. The detectives soon turn their attentions to the owner of a nearby crematorium and his shady relationship with a contract killer. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler try to secure a conviction against a piano teacher accused of molesting his students _ but the prime witness refuses to testify, afraid that a video of his ordeal will emerge. The detectives' difficulties are compounded by the discovery of other tapes that could compromise their case and cause further heartache. Christopher Meloni stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Murphy question a television producer when he is accused of molesting his daughter. His estranged wife wants justice for her child, but her failure to cooperate leads the detectives to suspect the accusation was a spiteful ploy. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Donal Logue

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins helps her friend press charges against her lover, whom she accuses of rape. However, when the case escalates to a charge of murder, Rollins finds herself forced to reveal details of her own private life on the stand. Hard-hitting drama, starring Kelli Giddish, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson is brought face to face with her attacker as the trial of serial rapist William Lewis begins, and as he exploits every legal trick in the book to impede progress, she experiences a delay in her recovery. Drama chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Criminal Minds: Beyond Borders
programme.desc: Two American flight attendants go missing while in Singapore, and Ryan and his International Response Team are called in to investigate. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: Criminal Minds: Beyond Borders
programme.desc: A night of hard-partying in Tijuana ends tragically for a 18-year-old American reveller, and Jack discovers his own son is working undercover with the Mexican cartels

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions, focusing on criminals in London involved in robberies, thefts, drug crimes, street brawls and weapons offences. In Soho, police officers monitor the activity of the area's 100,000 nightly visitors from a CCTV control room in an underground bunker, while in Lambeth the air support unit is called in when an armed gang are seen rampaging through the streets

programme.desc: In the wake of violent targeted attacks on 15 Division, Andy, Swarek and their fellow officers begin to piece together a past crime to find out what has happened to Oliver Shaw. While the squad desperately tries to find him, Dov and Wes clash over what is best for Chloe. As the shooter's plan is finally revealed, it may be too late for some members of the team

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: As Chloe and Sam lie in the hospital fighting for their lives, Andy and Dov get caught in a diner while an armed robbery is taking place. Gail cuts her hair off, while Andy confesses to Nick that she still loves Sam. Police drama following the lives of five police officers from 15 Division in Toronto, Canada, starring Missy Peregrym and Gregory Smith

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An attorney is killed shortly after deciding to file a sexual harrassment claim against his employer, and when Briscoe and Curtis investigate further, they discover both the alleged harasser and his wife have excellent motives for murder

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A hard-partying model, with a cocaine habit goes missing, and when the team investigates, a basketball player, a limo driver and a nightclub owner are suspected of orchestrating her disappearance

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is shot in her sleep, and further investigation leads the detectives to a boy whose drug-addicted mother has placed him in the care of her dealer. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate when a priest is found murdered in the confessional booth. The arrest of a teenager with a grudge seems to have them on the right track, but after discovering that the clergyman wasn't the killer's intended target they begin to focus their search on a petrol station cashier. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A high-level insurance executive is murdered, and suspicion soon falls on the father of a dying nine-year-old whose claim for a life-saving leukaemia treatment was turned down. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Two room-mates are found bludgeoned to death in their flat, and the handyman is the prime suspect. As his options run out, he takes a hostage, forcing Southerlyn into a course of action that could jeopardise her career. Award-winning police drama, guest starring Gene Silvers, and Elisabeth Rohm

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Navy Public Affairs Officer is killed, and when the team takes up the case, both the man's wife and his mistress emerge as potential suspects. Each woman offering a very different take on the chain of events that led to the murder, and the investigators are forced to decide which of the two is telling the truth. Meanwhile, DiNozzo's father comes to the aid of a homeless woman, who makes a surprising claim about his relationship with her. Guest starring Robert Wagner

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony finds himself in a difficult position when his identity is stolen. Worse yet, multiple fraudsters make use of his status as a special agent to blackmail US senators, and as the chain of events begins to spiral out of control, it is left to the real Dinozzo to bring the perpetrators to justice. Naval crime drama, starring Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Petty officer Kyle Friedgen is accused of killing his ex-girlfriend, but while his case is dismissed due to a mishandled warrant, his life and reputation are marred by suspicion that he got away with murder. Determined to clear his name in full, Friedgen volunteers to be court-martialed, on the condition that the NCIS team conducts its own investigation. Meanwhile, Bishop and Jake discuss their marital problems. Naval crime drama, starring Emily Wickersham, with Jamie Bamber

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a US Navy captain brings to light a link to Ducky's late mother, prompting the medical examiner to question a decision he made 37 years earlier. The team members exchange holiday gifts as Gibbs spends Christmas dinner with Fornell

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A social services worker and a deputy mayor are murdered, and the detectives discover a link to a 10-year-old mathematics prodigy and his obsessive, pushy father. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio, with Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team targets a photographer with a secret life whose fantasies may have crossed into reality. Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Amaro's recklessness once again makes him the target of Internal Affairs, and with both his personal life and his career on the line, he turns to the now-retired John Munch for advice. Meanwhile, an online advertisement for escorts leads to the rape and robbery of several male tourists, and Benson is shocked to discover she has a very personal connection to one of the suspects. Crime drama, starring Danny Pino, Mariska Hargitay and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When Amaro shoots a suspect who turns out to be a 14-year-old, unarmed African-American boy, he incurs the wrath of the city, internal affairs and the justice system. Drama, starring Danny Pino

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins and Benson investigate the rape of an underage girl, who initially refuses to co-operate or press charges against a trio of suspects, but eventually comes clean and leads the detectives to the strip club where she works - although her boss denies any wrongdoing and rejects a request for his client list. Starring Mariska Hargitay and Kelli Giddish

programme.title: Criminal Minds: Beyond Borders
programme.desc: An American is found beaten to death in Athens, after visiting to take up a role in the family business. Meanwhile, Jack breaks the news of his son's whereabouts to his wife Karen

programme.title: Criminal Minds: Beyond Borders
programme.desc: The International Response Team becomes the subject of an FBI investigation, after a mission in Kurjikstan results in the death of a suspect. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A college student is found dead, prompting the detective duo to search for a rapist on campus. However, a report from the medical examiner puts them on a different path, and they discover events may have gone down an even more sinister track

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A investigation into multiple homicides at a clothes shop leads to the arrest of a schizophrenic man, and his decision to represent himself in court provides McCoy with a formidable opponent

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A baby is found dead in his cot, and reports indicate he was poisoned. All the evidence pins the blame on a British au pair employed by the parents, but she claims the infant's death was a result of the mother's negligence. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate a state senator suspected of involvement in the disappearance of one of his aides. Their progress is hindered by a lack of evidence, but when her body is found in a marsh, the case turns into a murder inquiry. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green believe the fatal stabbing of psychologist Tracy Conley may be linked to confidential client information on her computer. They learn one of the files on her hard drive has been tampered with since her death - information that would have ensured a known rapist spends another five years behind bars. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A high-school student is found dead in an apartment building, and Briscoe and Green suspect an improper website may have played a part in her murder. As McCoy and Southerlyn investigate the case further, they realise the victim's best friend, who was reluctant to come forward as a witness, may provide the answers. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Jesse L Martin and Elisabeth Rohm

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby becomes the target of an assassination attempt while working in the lab - and the team's search for her would-be killer leads to the main suspect in an embezzlement trial at which she is appearing as a witness. However, subsequent developments also place her ex-boyfriend in the frame. Mark Harmon, Pauley Perrette and Michael Weatherly star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A 14-year-old boy manages to foil a home invasion, but when Gibbs is called in to investigate, he suspects the teenager may be withholding crucial information. As the case makes progress, Gibbs turns his attention to helping the boy's mother, the wife of a naval officer, and his efforts result in an invitation to the White House to meet the First Lady (Michelle Obama, guest starring as herself). Meanwhile, Director Vance and FBI Agent Fornell travel to London as part of the ongoing case involving the escaped British spies

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team searches for new leads after an undercover operation to apprehend a businessman who apparently uses acts of terror to manipulate the stock market is compromised. Bishop and Qasim join forces to find a break in the case

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After Gibbs spots the brother of an NCIS Most Wanted suspect, he immediately assumes his former alias and goes undercover with their infamous anti-government militia. Meanwhile, Bishop and Reeves partner on an off-the-books investigation

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: As a string of break-in assaults grows ever more violent, the team investigates an online incel group to identify a suspect. The complicated revenge plot involves a masked delivery man who attacks a couple in their own home with no apparent motive

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The drama about an NYPD team specialising in sexual crimes returns. Benson tries to juggle work and her new role as a foster mother to Noah Porter. Meanwhile, a new detective assigned to the unit gets off to a rocky start. Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team members search for a missing diabetic child who also suffers from an attachment disorder. Meanwhile, Benson is preoccupied by a pregnancy scare. Guest starring Rosanna Arquette

programme.desc: The trainee troopers prepare for their final riding exam over one of the Army's toughest courses. programme.title: Crimes at the Dark House ()
programme.desc: A criminal murders an aristocrat, planning to assume his identity - but is disappointed to discover the man he has replaced is heavily in debt. Horror based on Wilkie Collins' The Woman in White, starring Tod Slaughter and Sylvia Marriott

programme.title: Weakest Link
programme.desc: Anne Robinson hosts the quick-fire general knowledge quiz where players answer questions to add to a prize pot, voting off who they think is the weakest link after each round.

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman return with another round of celebrity-themed editions of the general knowledge quiz. This time, they invite four teams of comedy stars to take part, challenging them to come up with the least likely correct answers to a selection of questions posed to members of the public. The teams are Simon Day and Paul Chowdhry, Emily Atack and Ian Lavender, Kerry Godliman and Graeme Garden, and Steve Pemberton and Bob Mortimer

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Phillip Schofield hosts a festive edition of the game show. Loose Women's Sherrie Hewson and Lisa Maxwell are joined by their former co-panellist Denise Welch to take on the Cube together, aiming to complete a series of fiendishly difficult trials to raise money for charity. Olympic long-jump gold medallist Greg Rutherford also tackles the challenge, but will he match fellow athlete Mo Farah's record and scoop the jackpot?

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Former Dancing on Ice judge Karen Barber, TV presenter Dick Strawbridge, Coronation Street's Catherine Tyldesley (Eva Price) and comedian Russell Kane compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Weakest Link

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present another edition of the unorthodox general knowledge quiz show, inviting more famous faces to come up with the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. This time, the teams are Rich Hall and Shappi Khorsandi, Sian Lloyd and Fred MacAulay, Mark King and Stuart Maconie, and Chemmy Alcott and Amy Williams

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Mollie King from the Saturdays tackles a series of fiendishly difficult challenges as she tries to win up to £250,000 for her chosen charity. Cheered by on bandmates Una Foden, Frankie Sandford, Rochelle Humes and Vanessa White in the studio, the singer is under intense pressure to hold her nerve and avoid slip-ups inside The Cube. Back in 2012, Mo Farah became the first contestant to walk away with the jackpot - a feat nobody else has managed since. How will Mollie compare to the Olympic gold medallist? Phillip Schofield is on hand to provide words of encouragement

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Choreographer Arlene Phillips, TV garden designer Diarmuid Gavin, Countryfile presenter Helen Skelton and comedian Micky Flanagan compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts

programme.title: The Chase

programme.title: Weakest Link

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present another star-filled edition of the unorthodox general knowledge quiz, challenging more famous faces to come up with the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. This time, the celebrity duos come from the world of fashion, with Brix Smith-Start teaming up with Jonathan Phang, Amy Childs joining forces with Sam Faiers, Grace Woodward pairing with Brendan Courtney, and Lee Stafford partnering Nicky Clarke

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Former EastEnders bad girl Charlie Brooks (Janine) and retired England rugby union player Ben Cohen (Strictly Come Dancing) tackle a series of fiendishly difficult challenges testing skill, dexterity, reaction, wit and wisdom. Cheered by on friends and family in the studio, they're under intense pressure to hold their nerve and avoid slip-ups inside The Cube as they aim for the £250,000 charity jackpot. Each given nine lives at the start, the contestants can also use 'simplify' and 'trial run' lifelines to make the job a little easier. Phillip Schofield is the host

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Emmerdale actor Christopher Bisson (Jai Sharma), retired rugby player Gareth Thomas, BBC Breakfast presenter Naga Munchetty and McFly drummer Harry Judd compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty
